method: static source read (no rendered screenshots); hex tokens converted to OKLCH numerically

findings.title: Mockups define their own hardcoded-hex token blocks instead of the brand OKLCH tokens
findings.observed: All tokens hex (e.g. --accent:#e8a33d dark / #a8741f light / #8a5a14 landing)
findings.expected: OKLCH brand tokens per BRAND.md §3 / dg-system.css (R1, R2)
findings.fix: Replace token blocks with brand OKLCH values; at lift time, use the app's existing dg-system tokens directly.

findings.title: Accent bronze drifted toward flat gold in all three token sets
findings.notes: Hue +9 to +19 toward yellow, chroma down up to 35% (landing 0.102 vs 0.155), light-theme lightness +0.10 (worse contrast on ivory)
findings.fix: Swap to brand accent values per theme.

findings.title: Pass/fail colors are Tailwind defaults, not brand green/red
findings.expected: dark --pass oklch(0.74 0.150 152), --red oklch(0.66 0.17 25); light equivalents per dg-system
findings.fix: Swap to brand pass/red tokens both themes.

findings.title: --accent-deep inverted in dark theme (lighter than accent, used as text accent)
findings.expected: Brand dark accent-deep oklch(0.70 0.150 62) is darker; the bright text-accent role belongs to accent-light oklch(0.86 0.135 64)
findings.fix: Map the variable to oklch(0.86 0.135 64) in dark (text-accent role) and oklch(0.42 0.150 52) in light.

findings.title: Wrong system easing curve
findings.fix: One-line token swap in each file.

findings.title: Decorative emoji (⚡) in the cracked-screen streak pill
findings.expected: No emoji decoration (R9); streak iconography = monoline SVG or the brand flame
findings.fix: Replace with a monoline currentColor flame SVG.

findings.title: rgba() shadows on product chrome (landing demo card)
findings.location: landing-gauntlet-section.html .demo (rgba(34,29,21,0.3)); .cta accent glow in app mockup
findings.observed: Hex/rgba shadow on the demo card that lifts 1:1; 75% accent glow under the CTA
findings.expected: Shadows via color-mix with --ink/--text (R3); live .btn-primary ships box-shadow:none
findings.fix: color-mix the demo shadow; drop the CTA glow.

findings.title: Fraunces numeral without lining-nums (the exact v5.5.12 bug)
findings.expected: lining-nums tabular-nums + lnum/tnum on every Fraunces number (R5)

findings.title: Entrance scales below the 0.96–0.98 floor
findings.expected: Entrances start scale(0.96–0.98) (R7); the seal stamp is deliberately theatrical — raised, not removed
findings.fix: sealIn 0.7 → 0.9 (rotation + overshoot keep the stamp read); demo-seal 0.92 → 0.96.

findings.title: Eyebrow tracking over the 0.14em ceiling; sub-10px uppercase labels; Inter 750
findings.observed: Tracking 0.16–0.22em; uppercase labels at 8.5–9px; non-catalog weight 750
findings.fix: Cap tracking at 0.14em, raise labels to 10px, mark weight 700.

passes: Fraunces 600 display / Inter UI split correct throughout
color-mix used for all tints and state borders in the app mockup
No em dashes except the approved 'Go Pro — unlimited'
Both themes present in the app mockup (R12)
:active scale(0.97) press feedback on all clickables
Durations within the §6 table (0.45–0.55s reveals, 0.5s demo steps)
✓ in landing demo-seal is a semantic verdict mark (allowed)
Style coherence: editorial hairline cards, single focal bronze CTA per screen, no card-spam, no purple, no gradients on chrome
